# F1 Prediction App - Pull Request Template

## Description 📝

> Please describe the changes in this PR. What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Testing update

## F1 Rules Compliance ✅

If this PR touches F1-related code, confirm:
- [ ] Uses 2026 F1 points rules (Sprint: 8/7/6/5/4/3/2/1, Race: 25/18/15/12/10/8/6/4/2/1)
- [ ] Validates driver selection = 5 drivers
- [ ] Validates team selection = 2 teams
- [ ] No duplicate selections

## Testing Performed 🧪

Describe the testing you've done:

- [ ] Backend API tests pass (`go test -v .`)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Cross-browser/mobile testing (if applicable)

## Code Review Checklist 📋

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No sensitive information included (API keys, tokens)
- [ ] Commits are atomic and descriptive
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## Related Issues

Reference any related issues or tickets:
- Closes #
- Fixes #

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots for UI changes
